_doc: Atlas M7b auto_publisher time-of-day rules. Editable without code changes. Times are local America/Denver. Slot index 0=first post of the day, 1=second, etc.

past_due._doc: When multiple past-due records fire on the same wake, stagger them so they do not burst. Skip stagger inside a thread (future-work; no thread concept yet).

weekday_policy._doc: Which weekdays the publisher acts on. 0=Mon, 6=Sun. Posts scheduled on a disallowed day are still respected (Notion is source of truth) but new auto-scheduling avoids them.
